title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Oden, Unknown person #10, Wano Citizens, Unknown person #11, Kinemon as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What did you say!? If you win, you win!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I had the idea to change your sentence to a shooting execution a minute ago,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: And then kill your whole family!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're a kid who thinks with his ass!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That was not what was promised, often-sama s-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You guys, I am counting on you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That's an interesting story I just heard,

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Make the name Kozuki disappear forever!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whatever your ambitions, your body is already dead.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But the least I can do is finish it myself, as a sign of respect.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Will now end!! You will all die...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You!! You are a real madman!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: AHH!! I give up!! I give up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then it is you who reigns over Kuri?!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 40 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
